payload.answer: You concluded that Brain/Brain DB should be the durable source of truth for personal memory, while Cognee should be treated as a rebuildable derived projection/index from Brain rather than as the canonical store.
payload.decision: Use the Brain DB source-of-truth and Cognee projection records as relevant; ignore unrelated Slack intake, family, and preference facts.

entity_resolution.reason: The query refers to the Brain personal memory system and Cognee projection; the relevant records distinguish Brain DB as canonical and Cognee as derived/rebuildable.

payload.intent: Recall the user's prior conclusion about Brain and Cognee.

memory_cards.statement: Brain/Brain DB was concluded to be the durable source of truth for personal memory.
Cognee was concluded to be a rebuildable projection derived from Brain/Brain DB, not the canonical memory store.

details: Answered only from records relevant to Brain and Cognee.
Excluded unrelated Slack intake, family facts, and Sam preferences.

raw_text: {"intent":"Recall the user's prior conclusion about Brain and Cognee.","decision":"Use the Brain DB source-of-truth and Cognee projection records as relevant; ignore unrelated Slack intake, family, and preference facts.","memory_cards":[{"kind":"conclusion","statement":"Brain/Brain DB was concluded to be the durable source of truth for personal memory.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Brain","type":"system","role":"personal memory system"},{"name":"Brain DB","type":"database","role":"source of truth"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Brain DB","predicate":"is_source_of_truth_for","object":"personal memory"}]},{"kind":"conclusion","statement":"Cognee was concluded to be a rebuildable projection derived from Brain/Brain DB, not the canonical memory store.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Cognee","type":"system","role":"rebuildable projection"},{"name":"Brain DB","type":"database","role":"source of truth"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Cognee","predicate":"is_rebuildable_projection_of","object":"Brain DB"},{"subject":"Cognee","predicate":"is_not","object":"canonical source of truth"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"resolved","entity_id":null,"reason":"The query refers to the Brain personal memory system and Cognee projection; the relevant records distinguish Brain DB as canonical and Cognee as derived/rebuildable."},"conflict_classification":"no_conflict","answer":"You concluded that Brain/Brain DB should be the durable source of truth for personal memory, while Cognee should be treated as a rebuildable derived projection/index from Brain rather than as the canonical store.","citations":["Brain DB source-of-truth conclusion","Cognee rebuildable projection"],"repair_options":[],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Answered only from records relevant to Brain and Cognee.","Excluded unrelated Slack intake, family facts, and Sam preferences."]}}
